prompt: A 2D anime illustration of a sleeping {argument name="character type" default="chibi witch"} with black hair, wearing a large black hat decorated with {argument name="hat decoration" default="metal gears"} and a dark outfit with belts. She rests on a soft, dark blue starry pillow shaped like a crescent moon, with "ZZZ" floating near her head. She is accompanied by {argument name="animal companions" default="two black birds, one wearing a tiny top hat"}. The scene is framed by a circular night sky background featuring a glowing crescent moon and stars. The bottom edge is adorned with fluffy clouds and {argument name="props" default="steampunk gears, a glowing lantern, and a closed spellbook"}. The artwork features a {argument name="color palette" default="dark blue, black, and warm gold"} color palette and is styled as a paper cutout or die-cut sticker with a soft drop shadow against a plain off-white background.
translatedPrompt: 一张 2D 动漫插画，描绘了一个正在睡觉的 {argument name="character type" default="Q 版女巫"}，她有着黑色的头发，戴着一顶装饰有 {argument name="hat decoration" default="金属齿轮"} 的大黑帽子，身穿带有皮带的深色服装。她靠在一个柔软的深蓝色月牙形星空枕头上，头边漂浮着“ZZZ”字样。陪伴在她身边的是 {argument name="animal companions" default="两只黑鸟，其中一只戴着小礼帽"}。场景由一个带有发光月牙和星星的圆形夜空背景框起。底部边缘装饰着蓬松的云朵和 {argument name="props" default="蒸汽朋克齿轮、发光的灯笼以及一本合上的魔法书"}。整幅作品采用了 {argument name="color palette" default="深蓝色、黑色和暖金色"} 的配色方案，呈现出纸艺剪裁或模切贴纸的风格，并在纯米白色背景上带有柔和的投影。

breakdown.creativeCore: 蒸汽朋克 Q 版女巫贴纸插画：生成一张 2D 动漫风格的模切贴纸插画，描绘了带有蒸汽朋克元素和动物伙伴的 Q 版睡眠角色。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
